title: Parlei Agent Request Envelope
description: The standard inter-agent request message format for the Parlei parliament.

to.description: The agent this request is addressed to.

type.description: Optional message type for special messages.

spirit_token.description: Required only for Re-Origination-er invocation. Spirit of the Forest confirmation token.

items.description: One or more work items in this request.

id.description: Item ID, unique within this request. Used to match response items.

type.description: The category of work being requested.

description.description: What is being asked. Must be unambiguous.

context.description: Optional. Relevant file paths, data, or background needed to complete the item.
